3.tip: This is an excellent start to your army.

30.title: Dead Flowers

54.title: Hello, Zombie!

55.title: Mutation Nation

58.tip: These take a full day to grow.

59.tip: This will take you at least a full day.

61.title: The Perfect Yard

62.title: An Apple a Day...

62.tip: Find this in the Market in the Trees category under Crops.

63.title: Apple Harvest
63.tip: This is a very fast crop.

64.title: Orange You Glad
64.tip: This is a very fast crop.

65.title: If Life Gives You Lemons

65.tip: This is a very fast crop.

67.title: Party of Five
67.messageComplete: Make sure you Collect from your neighbors every day!
67.tip: Tap on the house button in the neighbor list to visit!

68.title: You're It!
68.messageComplete: Playing tag gives you both XP!
68.tip: Visit a neighbor's farm to play tag.

69.title: Thank You For Being A Friend
69.messageComplete: Don't forget to give out 3 Brains every day!
69.tip: You can give 3 Brains per day!

7.title: Overrun the Farm
7.tip: Make sure you have at least 8 zombies.

70.title: Learn to Plow
70.tip: Use the plow tool to make more plowed soil.

71.title: Learn to Plant
71.tip: Open the market or tap on plowed land to plant!
